StructurePhase.Reference: Pearson W.B., Hume Rothery W., J. Inst. Met., v81 p311 (1952)
StructurePhase.Comment: ANX: N. LPF Collection Code: 534299. Sample Preparation: STARTING MATERIALS:Cr. Compound Preparation: induction-melted. Sample annealed at 1473 K for 2 h. Article Title: THE CONSTITUTION OF CHROMIUM-MANGANESE ALLOYS BELOW 1000 °C. Temperature of Data Collection: 291 K. Minor Warning: No e.s.d reported/abstracted on the cell dimension. No R factor reported/abstracted. Wyckoff Sequence: a. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.
